Account

Your profile, contact email, and workspace preferences.

Account Security
Profile
~/.jbridge/profile
KK
KK User
user_id: usr_jb_71ka9
Used for billing receipts and security alerts. Verified ✓
Notifications
jbridge.ai/notify
Low credit balance
Email when balance falls below $10.
Anomalous spend
Alert if hourly spend exceeds 3× the 7-day average.
Provider outage
Notify when an upstream provider is degraded.
Product updates
Monthly digest of new models & features.
Workspace
Used in API key prefixes and billing receipts.
Danger zone
irreversible
Delete account
Permanently delete your account, revoke all keys, and erase usage data. This cannot be undone.
